‚óè Edit StorySetWidget.jsx +1 -1
  ‚îî packages/storyboard/src/internals/canvas/widgets/StorySetWidget.jsx

‚óè Done. Flow:

   1. The iframe (componentSetIsolate) observes its grid and posts :content-size
  messages whenever the grid's height changes.
   2. StorySetWidget stores the latest content size in a ref.
   3. On onResizeEnd, if widget height > content height + header, it calls onUpdate
  with the snapped height and toggles a snapping flag that adds a 220ms cubic-bezier
  height transition for that one update.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--simple-server [‚éá 0.5.0--simple-server*%]
